action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline MLP (hidden=512, 2 epochs) gives terrible mean_r2 (-2.17e11) driven by r2_ptend_q=-5e11 (others OK: 0.22/0.92/0.62). Analysis: Severe underfitting on humidity tendency; 2 epochs insufficient for this high-dim regression, val_mse likely still high. ~27s/epoch leaves room for longer training. Decision: Scale to hidden_dim=1024 + deeper net (4 layers), epochs=20, lower lr=5e-4 + scheduler, add train/val loss logging to metrics.jsonl for curves; keep predict.py compatible via ckpt metadata; submit_eval immediately after to get new baseline and time measurement.
